splash.subtitle:
Real-time school bus tracking
for parents

slide1.title: Real-time tracking
slide1.body: Know exactly where your child's bus is at any moment with an interactive live map.

slide2.title: Instant alerts
slide2.body: Get notified the moment your child boards or gets off the school bus, even in the background.

slide3.title: Safety first
slide3.body: A built-in SOS button to immediately alert the school and driver in case of emergency.

login.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number

otp.title: Enter the code
otp.subtitle: We sent a 6-digit code to
otp.demoHint: Demo mode — SMS not configured · Show code
otp.devSub: SMS sending isn't configured yet. Use this code to sign in:

errors.retryAfter: Please wait {{seconds}}s before requesting a new code.
errors.tooMany: Too many attempts. Request a new code.

errors.unknownPhone: Phone not recognized. Contact your school.

forgot.title: Forgot Password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot.successBody: If an account exists for {{email}}, you'll receive a password reset email shortly. Don't forget to check your spam folder.
forgot.cooldown: You can request another link in {{time}}
forgot.sentToast: Reset link sent. Check your email.
forgot.rateLimited: Too many requests. Try again in {{time}}.
forgot.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
forgot.noNetwork: Network error. Check your connection and try again.
forgot.ifExists: If that email exists, a reset link has been sent.

home.noChildrenHint: Contact your school to link your child.

language.restartHint: App layout will switch direction for Arabic.
language.restartRequired: Please restart the app to apply the new layout.

absence.title: Mark absent
absence.oneDayHelper: 1 day selected — tap a later day to extend.
absence.multiDayHelper: {{count}} days selected — tap inside the range to collapse.
absence.successBody: The bus will skip the pickup for the selected day(s).
absence.cancelBody: The bus will resume picking up your child.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.emptyMessage: You will see updates about your child's trips here.

trips.title: Trip History
trips.emptyMessage: Past and upcoming trips will appear here.

sos.title: SOS
sos.sentBody: The school administration and driver have been notified. Stay on this screen for updates.
sos.instructions: Press and hold the button for 2 seconds to alert the school and driver. This is for genuine emergencies only.
sos.sentToast: SOS alert sent to school and driver
sos.failedToast: Could not reach the server. We will retry.
sos.a11yHint: Press and hold for 2 seconds to send

delete.title: Delete account
delete.warningBody:
We will immediately delete
• your profile (name, email, phone)
• your linked children
• your notification history
• your trip history

Anonymised safety records may be retained for up to 30 days as required by law. After that, all your data is gone for good.
delete.askAgainBody: This permanently deletes your profile, your linked children, and your trip history. This cannot be undone.
delete.failed: Could not delete your account. Please contact support.

collect.title: What we collect
collect.body:
• Account data — name, email, phone — to identify you and let the driver/school reach you.
• Children — name, school, route, photo (optional). Provided by you and visible only to you, your school, and the assigned driver.
• Live location of the bus — sent by the driver's device. Your phone's own location is used only to center the map and is never sent to our servers.
• Device + crash data — anonymous diagnostics to keep the app stable.

noCollect.title: What we do NOT collect
noCollect.body: We do not access your contacts, photos, microphone, calendar, health data, or browsing history. We do not track you across other apps or websites. We do not sell your data — ever.

use.title: How we use it
use.body: Strictly to operate the service: show you where the bus is, notify you about boarding and drop-off, let you reach the driver, and send safety alerts. No advertising, no profiling.

sharing.title: Sharing
sharing.body: Your data is shared only with: (a) your child's school/transport company, (b) the assigned driver (name + bus only), and (c) infrastructure providers (hosting, push notifications) bound by data-processing agreements.

rights.title: Your rights
rights.body: You can access, correct or delete your data at any time from Profile → Delete account. Deletion is permanent and processed within 30 days. You can also email privacy@ecobus.app.

retention.title: Retention
retention.body: Account data is kept while your account is active. Trip history is kept for 12 months for safety review, then deleted. Bus GPS pings are kept for 30 days.

children.title: Children
children.body: EcoBus is operated by parents/guardians on behalf of their children. Children do not interact with the app directly. Data about minors is processed under parental consent.

s1.p: EcoBus is a school-transport tracking service offered to parents/guardians through their child's school or transport company. Use of the app constitutes acceptance of these terms.

s2.p: You are responsible for keeping your login credentials secure and for the accuracy of the information you provide.

s3.p: You agree to use EcoBus only to monitor your own child's transport. You may not reverse engineer the app, scrape its data, or use it to harass drivers or other users.

s4.p: Notifications and the SOS feature are provided on a best-effort basis and depend on network availability. Do not rely on EcoBus alone in emergencies — always also call local emergency services.

s5.p: You may delete your account at any time from Profile → Delete account. We may suspend accounts that violate these terms.

s6.p: EcoBus is provided "as is". To the maximum extent permitted by law, we disclaim all implied warranties.

errors.boundaryBody: We hit an unexpected problem. The team has been notified. You can try again — your data is safe.
errors.boundaryHint: If this keeps happening, try restarting the app.
errors.unauthorized: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.rateLimited: Too many attempts. Try again later.

tracking.driverPhoneMissing: Driver phone is not available right now.
